title: Peculiar Creatures
description: Adds peculiar creatures to minecraft using polymer
body:
### Requires Polymer Read how [polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) and [polymer auto host](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/) works first. If the resource pack is disabled, the items will use vanilla textures and entities will turn into their vanilla counterparts.
(e.g. smurfcat turns into a small zombie with smurfcat player head and white and blue leather armor)
Custom sounds can only be heard by people with the resource pack. --- ### Content This mod adds creatures that you wouldn't have expected to be in minecraft, completely server sided. What's in the mod currently:
Spoiler * smurfcat * smurfish cap * spectre music disc * temporary Ogre toilet * Ogre * Ear of the Ogre * All Star music disc
--- ### Planned
Spoiler * appa using https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/appa-ghasts as model * better shrek structure
--- ### Credits * Ogre model & texture [Warden to Shrek by bisoncl](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/warden-to-shrek) * Sky Bison model & textures [Appa Ghasts by Fishysalmon02 ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/appa-ghasts) * ["The spectre--Alan Walker" by CHNYinXianghan](https://noteblock.world/song/G9Ppi5rrXW) is licensed under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0) * ["All Star" by HesterClapp](https://noteblock.world/song/mtXzIETUh4) is licensed under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0)
